channel.title: Lullaby on Sleep as Android Docs
channel.description: Recent content in Lullaby on Sleep as Android Docs

item.title: Lullaby
item.description:
.Plays you a lullaby when you get to bed to help you fall asleep better.

For lullabies, you can use built-in Nature sound lullabies, your own music, Spotify, online radio, or you can mix in binaural beats. You can listen to your favourite music the whole night, or let the app control the volume and gradually lower it to zero after you started falling asleep with Turn off when sleeping feature.
